stemHtml: An aircraft is fitted with an ACAS II system. The system is linked with a transponder to generate…

options.a: TAs, which are coordinated and complementary, for aircraft fitted with the same or different types of ACAS.
options.b: TAs, and if the other aircraft is also fitted with ACAS II, the TAs are coordinated and complementary.
options.c: RAs, and if the other aircraft is also fitted with ACAS II, the RAs are coordinated and complementary.
options.d: RAs, but these cannot be coordinated if the concerned aircraft are fitted with Mode-S transponders.
